title: alansmia lanigera
intro: Alansmia lanigera, also known as the Lanigera Alansmia, is a type of epiphytic fern native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe coughs, relieve congestion, and promote overall respiratory health. Alansmia lanigera can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for a range of applications and uses in traditional medicine and holistic healing practices.
